name: Parker Type 210 Mechanical Seal 1.125" x 1.375"
description: The Parker Type 210 is a general-purpose mechanical seal for centrifugal pumps and mixers. With a 1.125-inch shaft diameter and 1.375-inch bore, this unbalanced seal handles water, light chemicals, and hydrocarbons up to 100°C.
shortDescription: General-purpose mechanical seal, 1.125" shaft, unbalanced design, Buna-N bellows.
technicalDescription: Single cartridge mechanical seal with elastomeric bellows, carbon vs ceramic faces, and 316 stainless steel hardware. Unbalanced design suitable for pressures up to 12 bar. Temperature range -20°C to +100°C.
features: Elastomeric bellows design compensates for misalignment
Carbon rotating face against ceramic stationary face
316 stainless steel metal parts
Pre-assembled cartridge eliminates field measurement
Interchangeable with most ANSI pump seals
benefits: Simplifies pump seal replacement with cartridge design
Cost-effective sealing for standard pump applications
seoDescription: Parker Type 210 general-purpose mechanical seal, 1.125" shaft, carbon vs ceramic, Buna-N bellows. For centrifugal pumps and mixers.

faq.question: What is the maximum pressure?
faq.answer: The unbalanced Type 210 seal handles up to 12 bar (175 psi) standard.

faq.question: Can this seal be used for hot water?
faq.answer: Yes, up to 100°C with standard Buna-N bellows. For higher temperatures, EPDM bellows are available.

faq.question: Is this seal bi-directional?
faq.answer: Yes, the Type 210 is designed for bi-directional rotation.

name: Freudenberg NBR O-Ring 90 Shore A (2.5mm x 50mm ID)
description: Freudenberg premium NBR 90 Shore A O-ring for static and dynamic sealing applications. With 2.5mm cross-section and 50mm inner diameter, it provides reliable sealing in hydraulic and pneumatic systems.
shortDescription: NBR 90 Shore A O-ring, 2.5mm cross-section, 50mm ID, premium quality.
technicalDescription: Precision-molded nitrile rubber O-ring per ISO 3601-1:2012. 90 Shore A hardness for extrusion resistance. Suitable for mineral oils, greases, water, and compressed air.
features: 90 Shore A hardness for high-pressure sealing
NBR compound for oil and fuel resistance
ISO 3601-1:2012 compliant dimensions
Excellent abrasion resistance
Wide operating temperature range
benefits: Long service life with stable material properties
seoTitle: Freudenberg NBR 90 Shore A O-Ring 2.5mm x 50mm ID
seoDescription: Freudenberg premium NBR O-ring, 90 Shore A, 50mm ID x 2.5mm cross-section. ISO 3601-1 compliant. For hydraulic and pneumatic sealing.

faq.question: What is the temperature range?
faq.answer: Continuous operation from -30°C to +100°C, with peak to +120°C.

faq.question: What fluids is this compatible with?
faq.answer: Mineral oils, greases, hydraulic fluids (H, HL, HLP), water, and compressed air.

faq.question: What is the difference between 70 and 90 Shore A?
faq.answer: 90 Shore A is harder and more resistant to extrusion at high pressures. 70 Shore A provides better low-pressure sealing on rough surfaces.

name: SKF HMS5 Radial Shaft Oil Seal 50x72x10mm
description: The SKF HMS5 is a radial shaft seal with a nitrile rubber sealing lip and a steel outer case. Designed for oil sealing in rotating shaft applications, this 50x72x10mm seal is widely used in gearboxes, pumps, and electric motors.
shortDescription: Radial shaft seal, 50mm shaft x 72mm bore x 10mm width, NBR lip.
technicalDescription: Radial shaft seal with rubber-covered outside diameter (HMS5 type), tension spring-loaded NBR sealing lip, and steel case insert. Performs well at shaft speeds up to 12 m/s.
features: Rubber-coated outer diameter for bore sealing
Tension spring maintains lip contact at low speeds
NBR sealing lip for oil and grease retention
Steel case insert for robust handling
Protective dust lip on standard designs
benefits: Prevents oil leakage and contaminant ingress
material: NBR Lip, Steel Case, Rubber Coating
seoDescription: SKF HMS5 radial shaft oil seal, 50x72x10mm, NBR lip, rubber-coated OD. For gearboxes, pumps, and electric motor shaft sealing.

faq.question: What is the maximum operating temperature?
faq.answer: NBR lip seals operate from -40°C to +100°C continuously, up to +120°C intermittently.

faq.question: Can this seal handle pressure?
faq.answer: Standard HMS5 seals are designed for zero or minimal pressure. For pressurized applications, a PTFE lip seal is recommended.

faq.question: What shaft surface finish is required?
faq.answer: A ground surface finish of 0.2-0.8 μm Ra with no machining lead is recommended for seal life.

name: Parker Spiral Wound Gasket 4" Class 300
description: The Parker spiral wound gasket is designed for high-temperature and high-pressure flange sealing in process piping. This 4-inch Class 300 gasket features 316 stainless steel windings with flexible graphite filler.
shortDescription: Spiral wound gasket, 4-inch Class 300, 316 SS winding, graphite filler.
technicalDescription: Spiral wound gasket with 316L stainless steel outer ring and graphite filler. Inner ring of 316 SS prevents flange erosion. Suitable for Class 300 raised-face flanges per ASME B16.20.
features: Spiral wound construction for resilience
316 SS outer ring for centering and blowout resistance
Flexible graphite filler for high-temperature sealing
316 SS inner ring prevents flange erosion
ASME B16.20 compliant dimensions
benefits: Reliable sealing under thermal cycling conditions
seoDescription: Parker spiral wound gasket, 4-inch Class 300, 316 SS winding, graphite filler. For high-temperature and high-pressure flange sealing.

faq.question: What is the temperature rating?
faq.answer: Flexible graphite filler allows operation from -200°C to +450°C continuously.

faq.question: Can this gasket be re-used?
faq.answer: No, spiral wound gaskets should be replaced after each disassembly for reliable sealing.

faq.question: What bolt torque is recommended?
faq.answer: Recommended bolt stress is 30,000-50,000 psi yield, applied in a cross-pattern sequence.

name: SKF PTFE Gland Packing 12mm (5kg Spool)
description: SKF PTFE gland packing is a multi-filament braided packing for valve stem and pump shaft sealing. This 12mm square section packing on a 5kg spool is chemically inert and suitable for aggressive media.
shortDescription: PTFE gland packing, 12mm square, 5kg spool, chemically inert.
technicalDescription: Multi-filament PTFE yarn braided packing with PTFE lubricant impregnation. Square cross-section for valve stuffing boxes and pump glands. Low friction coefficient with high chemical resistance.
features: PTFE multi-filament yarn for chemical resistance
PTFE lubricant impregnation for low friction
Square cross-section for standard glands
Temperature range -100°C to +260°C
Suitable for pH 0-14
benefits: Low coefficient of friction reduces shaft wear
Long service life in corrosive environments
seoDescription: SKF PTFE multi-filament gland packing, 12mm square, 5kg spool, chemically inert. For valves, pumps, and agitator shaft sealing.

faq.question: How many rings are needed for a valve?
faq.answer: Typically 4-6 rings are required for a standard valve stuffing box, cut at 45° with staggered joints.

faq.question: Can this be used for rotating shafts?
faq.answer: Yes, with a lubricated gland follower. For rotating equipment, allow slight leakage for lubrication.

faq.question: What is the shelf life?
faq.answer: PTFE packing has an indefinite shelf life when stored in a cool, dry environment.

name: Freudenberg V-Ring Seal 60mm Shaft
description: The Freudenberg V-Ring is a versatile axial shaft seal that provides effective protection against dirt, dust, and splash water. This 60mm version fits over a shaft and seals against the bearing housing face.
shortDescription: V-ring axial seal, 60mm shaft, NBR, for dirt and moisture exclusion.
technicalDescription: One-piece elastomeric V-ring seal with flexible sealing lip. Stretches over shaft and contacts a radial face. Suitable for both rotating and static applications. NBR compound with wide temperature range.
features: One-piece elastomeric design
Fits multiple shaft sizes (stretch-fit)
Effective exclusion of dirt and moisture
No housing bore required
Quick installation without tools
benefits: Extends bearing life by excluding contaminants
Simplifies design with no housing counterbore needed
seoDescription: Freudenberg VR-60 NBR V-ring seal for 60mm shafts. Axial dirt and moisture exclusion for bearings, electric motors, and conveyors.

faq.question: Can the V-Ring be used submersed?
faq.answer: No, the V-Ring is designed for splash and spray protection, not for submerged applications.

faq.question: What is the shaft tolerance requirement?
faq.answer: The V-Ring stretches to fit. For a 60mm V-Ring, shaft tolerance of h9 to h11 is recommended.

faq.question: Can this seal handle axial movement?
faq.answer: Yes, the V-Ring can accommodate limited axial shaft movement and angular misalignment.
